creator: sprice@hiwaay.net
text:
---------- Forwarded message ----------
Date: Tue, 29 Feb 2000 16:21:40 +0900
From: Akinori -Aki- MUSHA <knu@idaemons.org>
To: gnats-admin@FreeBSD.org, flathill@flathill.gr.jp
Subject: Re: ports/16966: japanese/namazu2: a new port

  Hi, please apply the following patch.  When you handle ports/16961
depending on this port, don't miss its followup.  I renamed p5-kakasi
to p5-Text-Kakasi.

--- Makefile.orig	Fri Feb 25 05:42:43 2000
+++ Makefile	Tue Feb 29 16:13:37 2000
@@ -15,10 +15,10 @@
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	intl.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/gettext
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PM_BASE}/File/MMagic.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-MMagic \
-		${PM_BASE}/${PERL_ARCH}/Text/Kakasi.pm:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/p5-kakasi \
+		${PM_BASE}/${PERL_ARCH}/Text/Kakasi.pm:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/p5-Text-Kakasi \
 		${PM_BASE}/${PERL_ARCH}/NKF.pm:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/p5-nkf
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PM_BASE}/File/MMagic.pm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-File-MMagic \
-		${PM_BASE}/${PERL_ARCH}/Text/Kakasi.pm:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/p5-kakasi \
+		${PM_BASE}/${PERL_ARCH}/Text/Kakasi.pm:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/p5-Text-Kakasi \
 		${PM_BASE}/${PERL_ARCH}/NKF.pm:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/p5-nkf
 
 PM_BASE=	${LOCALBASE}/lib/perl5/site_perl/${PERL_VER}

-- 
                           /
                          /__  __
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."
